feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Road to Sacramento
entry.summary:
Author: hyacinth_fiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,099Chapters: 23/25Kudos: 78

Summary: The universe has a wonderful sense of timing and Stiles and co. are thrown into all kinds of antics when the world goes to hell in a handbasket. Join them as they journey away from the security of their old lives and towards the hope of a new safety. Do they make it? I suppose you'll have to read on to find out. This story is going to be slow burn, like that languid yearning we all know and love seasoned with well-ripened apocalypse angst. There will be spice in this tale, eventually. Solid trigger warning for canon-typical blood/violence, casual swearing, and some other bits I'll stick in the notes of the relevant chapters

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,009Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,579Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: No more
entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,878Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 26

Summary: After the climax of actions with gerard circumstances push stiles to discover a truce about himself specifically his mother’s bloodline. New complications arise when a pack of alphas arrives in town and between learning more about himself and staying alive stiles falls for a certain grumpy alpha.

entry.title: One-Hit Wonder
entry.summary:
Author: DarkInsanity (Stereklenidus)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,637Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Derek Hale has survived hunters, kanimas, and his own family's drama. But Stiles Stilinski's green text bubbles?That's the final straw.So he does the only logical thing: buys Stiles a brand new iPhone, screen protector already on, wrapped like a bomb he's defusing.

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,399Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 114

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 135,132Chapters: 86/?Kudos: 281

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: Town Rumors
entry.summary:
Author: Red_127

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,991Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 565

Summary: After Stiles's mother dies, his father remarries Melissa McCall and Stiles suddenly finds himself on the outskirts of his own family. In his last year of high school and while taking night classes as a local community college, Stiles meets Derek Hale and the two make an instant connection. Derek pulls Stiles into his own family and shows him what it's like to truly be loved by people who would do anything for you. Even when that means causing abnormal amounts of chaos, tricking the entire town, and generally ruining the Sheriff's Day.

entry.title: The Legend of The Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: Killmesoftly_s

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,915Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 82

Summary: The Alpha was feared for so long. He was a darkness, a demon who knew nothing beyond the jungle's wilds. No man or woman was foolish enough to speak to the spirit, ask it its name. The villagers called the spirit, The Alpha.  He was more than a man but not an ape. There were whispers of his nails becoming small knives and his eyes shining ruby red. No one ever got close enough to say for certain if these things were true, but no one would dare argue against it. None who’d seen the alpha, face to face, lived to tell the tale. Whether they died at his hands or the apes he called family, it did not matter.   It's been years since the Alpha-also known as Derek Hale, left Africa to live in England with his husband; Stiles. Danger lurks on the horizon as Adrian Harris and his sadistic league devise a scheme that lures the couple to the Congo. Harris plans to capture the Alpha and deliver him to an old enemy in exchange for diamonds. When Stiles becomes a pawn in his devious plot, Derek must return to the jungle to save the man he loves.

entry.title: It Isn't Being an Asshole, If He's Right (He's Not Right)
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,977Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: No one has suffered as much as Stiles is right now. Because right now he needs to deal with falling in love with a werewolf, and being in the hell that is high school. And to make matters worse, his dad is dating the alpha wolf that rolled into town to kill them all. Stiles knows they cannot trust the guy, he just needs to get his dad to understand that.

entry.title: Part Two: Winter Remedies
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,309Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: Professor Derek Hale had just walked into the store. And three steps behind him, wrapped in a green scarf and carrying a sniffling little boy on one hip, was Professor Stiles Stilinski. For one completely insane second, Penny’s brain offered her only one thought: Oh no. Eli’s sick.

entry.title: Wayward Instinct
entry.summary:
Author: olimakiella

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,749Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 21

Summary: In a surveillance-heavy, interstellar system, controlled by the Sentinel Authority Network (the SAN, known colloquially as ‘Verse Authorities, or simply the VA), a small, easily overlooked smuggling ship survives on discretion, precision, and trust. By staying invisible. Its captain, Derek Hale, runs jobs under the radar with a crew built on trust, skill, and shared history. The ship’s success is not luck.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,520Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: Lady_Grey94

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,724Chapters: 1/12Kudos: 27

Summary: Unknown caller. Okay. Great. Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment. “Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment. “Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone.orAn AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: The Wrong Man in First Class
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,096Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Slutty flight attendant Stiles spots hot, Rolex-wearing Derek in first class and assumes rich jackpot. She turns full whore: short skirt hikes, tits in his face, turbulence dry-hump orgasm, begs raw cock in hotel. Sweet office worker Derek (sent instead of CEO) gets wrecked, falls hard for her greedy pussy. Truth hits: he’s just a salaryman. Stiles tries to bolt—“No money, no me.” Derek snaps—rips her dress, pins her down, fucks her raw and rough: slaps her ass red, chokes her, breeds her deep while growling, “You chased cash, but this ‘poor’ cock owns your cunt now.” She breaks—cums screaming, begs to stay. No more rich fantasies. Just his thick dick owning her forever.
